Interface IXMLReader2

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.esriSystem
Assembly
ESRI.Server.System.dll

Provides access to members that control the sequential reading of XML.

[Guid("93C1AC3B-4520-450D-B005-95FD01B50C4A")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IXMLReader2 : IXMLReader
